description_long: This is a vintage-style red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top. The extinguisher features a prominent, weathered label with faded white and red instructional graphics and text on its front. Attached to the top is a robust, dark metallic handle and lever mechanism, along with a long, conical discharge nozzle connected by a curved metal tube. The nozzle and handle show signs of wear and oxidation, indicating age and frequent handling. The base of the extinguisher is rounded, and the paint is chipped in several areas, revealing the underlying metal. This object is typically found mounted on walls or in accessible locations in urban environments for emergency use.
description: A weathered red metal fire extinguisher with a prominent label, metal handle, and a long conical nozzle, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full label, handle, and nozzle assembly clearly.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the curvature of the body and the attachment of the nozzle and handle.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the plain red back, the mounting bracket, and the full length of the nozzle.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the nozzle's alignment and the cylindrical shape of the extinguisher.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large, rectangular, white and red label with text and symbols is present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A metal mounting bracket is attached to the upper side of the extinguisher, designed for wall mounting.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A long, conical, dark metallic nozzle is attached to the top via a curved metal tube; no flexible hose is visible.
